# Orphan

This note deliberately links to nothing and nothing links to it. It exists to be detected as an
orphan by the graph engine regardless of folder layout. Padding text follows so the note comfortably
exceeds any length threshold a future orphan rule might apply, keeping the fixture forward-compatible.
